daily_summary.headline: Exciting Space Launches and Aurora Opportunities Await!

top_events.title: Firefly Alpha | Stairway to Seven
top_events.description: Firefly Alpha's test flight, a return-to-flight mission after a previous failure, testing key systems for future upgrades.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for test flight insights.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | EchoStar 25
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon 9 launching EchoStar 25, a communications satellite for North America.
top_events.action: Tune in for live coverage of the satellite deployment.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: G1 geomagnetic storm offers a chance to see auroras at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Check northern skies for possible auroras.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
